questions: How to choose MDE for an experiment?
qa.answer: MDE is the smallest lift you want to be able to detect with chosen power and significance. Smaller MDE needs more samples/time; choose based on business impact worth shipping.
implication: Estimate baseline rates/variance; use calculators for sample size.
Avoid underpowered tests; adjust traffic allocation or duration.
Set decision rules tied to MDE and guardrail metrics.
